class.name: ballbot_motion/PDMotionPlanner
class.description: PD Motion Planner controller for Nav2. Uses Proportional-Derivative control to follow a global path. Supports holonomic (omnidirectional) robots via lateral vy output. Set max_lateral_velocity > 0 to enable sideways correction for ballbot.

class.name: ballbot_motion/PurePursuit
class.description: Pure Pursuit controller for Nav2. Uses the carrot-on-a-stick algorithm to follow a global path. Supports holonomic robots via lateral vy output for cross-track correction. Set max_lateral_velocity > 0 to enable sideways correction for ballbot.
